title: Shipping Policy
content:
Shipping Policy - Last Updated: January 2024

Standard Shipping (5-7 business days):
- Free for orders over $50
- $5.99 for orders under $50
- Available for all 50 US states

Express Shipping (2-3 business days):
- $12.99 flat rate
- Free for orders over $150
- Not available for PO boxes

Overnight Shipping (1 business day):
- $24.99 flat rate
- Must order before 2 PM EST
- Available Monday-Friday only

International Shipping:
- Canada: $15-25 depending on weight (7-14 days)
- Europe: $20-35 depending on weight (10-18 days)
- Australia/Asia: $25-45 depending on weight (14-21 days)
- Customer responsible for customs duties and taxes

Order Tracking:
All orders include tracking numbers sent via email within 24 hours of shipment.
You can track your order at www.example.com/track

title: Return and Refund Policy
content:
Return and Refund Policy

Return Window:
- 30 days from delivery date for full refund
- 31-60 days: Store credit only
- After 60 days: No returns accepted

Conditions for Return:
- Item must be unused and in original packaging
- All tags and labels must be attached
- Proof of purchase required (order number or receipt)

Refund Process:
1. Initiate return at www.example.com/returns
2. Print prepaid return label (free for defective items)
3. Drop off at any authorized location
4. Refund processed within 5-7 business days of receipt

Refund Methods:
- Original payment method: 5-7 business days
- Store credit: Immediate upon return receipt

Non-Returnable Items:
- Digital products and software licenses
- Gift cards
- Personalized/custom items
- Items marked as "Final Sale"

Damaged or Defective Items:
Contact support within 48 hours of delivery for immediate replacement or refund.

title: Subscription Plans and Pricing
content:
Subscription Plans - Updated March 2024

Basic Plan - $9.99/month:
- Access to core features
- Email support (24-48 hour response)
- 5GB cloud storage
- Single user license

Pro Plan - $29.99/month (Most Popular):
- All Basic features
- Priority support (4-8 hour response)
- 50GB cloud storage
- Up to 5 team members
- Advanced analytics dashboard
- API access

Enterprise Plan - $99.99/month:
- All Pro features
- Dedicated account manager
- 24/7 phone support
- Unlimited cloud storage
- Unlimited team members
- Custom integrations
- SLA guarantee

Annual Billing:
Save 20% with annual billing:
- Basic: $95.90/year (save $24)
- Pro: $287.90/year (save $72)
- Enterprise: $959.90/year (save $240)

Payment Methods:
- Credit/Debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex)
- PayPal
- Bank transfer (Enterprise only)

Cancellation:
Cancel anytime from your account settings. Access continues until end of billing period. No partial refunds for annual plans after 30 days.

title: Account Security and Two-Factor Authentication
content:
Account Security Guide

Two-Factor Authentication (2FA):
Enable 2FA for enhanced security:
1. Go to Account Settings > Security
2. Click "Enable 2FA"
3. Scan QR code with authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy)
4. Enter verification code to confirm

Backup Codes:
- Download 10 backup codes when enabling 2FA
- Store in secure location
- Each code can be used once
- Generate new codes if lost

Password Requirements:
- Minimum 8 characters
- At least one uppercase letter
- At least one lowercase letter
- At least one number
- At least one special character

Password Reset:
- Click "Forgot Password" on login page
- Check email for reset link (valid for 24 hours)
- Contact support if no email received within 5 minutes

Suspicious Activity:
If you notice unauthorized access:
1. Change password immediately
2. Review login history in Account Settings
3. Enable 2FA if not already active
4. Contact support to report incident

Login Issues:
- Clear browser cache and cookies
- Try incognito/private browsing mode
- Disable browser extensions temporarily
- Ensure system time is correct (affects 2FA codes)

title: API Documentation - Getting Started
content:
API Documentation v2.0

Base URL: https://api.example.com/v2

Authentication:
All API requests require an API key in the header:
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

Rate Limits:
- Basic plan: 100 requests/hour
- Pro plan: 1000 requests/hour
- Enterprise: 10000 requests/hour

Common Endpoints:

GET /users/{id}
Retrieve user information by ID.
Response: { "id": "123", "name": "John Doe", "email": "john@example.com" }

POST /tickets
Create a new support ticket.
Body: { "subject": "Issue", "description": "Details", "priority": "high" }

GET /orders/{id}
Retrieve order details.
Response includes: items, status, tracking_number, shipping_address

Error Codes:
200 - Success
400 - Bad Request (invalid parameters)
401 - Unauthorized (invalid API key)
429 - Rate Limit Exceeded
500 - Internal Server Error

SDKs Available:
- Python: pip install example-api
- Node.js: npm install @example/api
- PHP: composer require example/api

Webhook Integration:
Configure webhooks to receive real-time updates:
1. Go to Developer Settings
2. Add webhook URL
3. Select events to subscribe to
4. Verify webhook signature for security

title: Troubleshooting Common Issues
content:
Troubleshooting Guide

Error Code 502 - Bad Gateway:
Cause: Server connectivity issue
Solution:
1. Wait 2-3 minutes and retry
2. Clear browser cache
3. Try different browser
4. Check status page: status.example.com

Slow Performance:
Possible causes and solutions:
1. Large file uploads - Use chunked upload API
2. Browser extensions - Disable ad blockers temporarily
3. Network issues - Test connection speed
4. Outdated app - Update to latest version

Email Not Received:
1. Check spam/junk folder
2. Add noreply@example.com to contacts
3. Verify email address is correct
4. Wait 10 minutes for delivery
5. Contact support if still missing

Mobile App Crashes:
1. Force close and reopen app
2. Update to latest version from app store
3. Clear app cache (Android) or reinstall (iOS)
4. Ensure device meets minimum requirements

File Upload Failures:
- Maximum file size: 100MB
- Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, PNG
- Check internet connection stability
- Try uploading in smaller batches

Calendar Sync Issues:
1. Disconnect and reconnect integration
2. Check calendar permissions
3. Ensure timezone settings match
4. Sync may take up to 15 minutes

title: Student Discount Program
content:
Student Discount Program

Eligibility:
- Currently enrolled students at accredited institutions
- Valid student email (.edu) or ID required
- Discount valid for 12 months, renewable with verification

Discount Details:
- 50% off all subscription plans
- Applies to monthly and annual billing
- Cannot be combined with other offers

How to Apply:
1. Create account with student email
2. Go to Billing > Student Verification
3. Upload student ID or enrollment certificate
4. Verification completed within 24 hours
5. Discount automatically applied

Supported Verification Methods:
- Student email verification (instant)
- SheerID integration
- Manual document upload

Renewal:
- Re-verify annually to maintain discount
- Notification sent 30 days before expiration
- Grace period of 14 days after expiration

Not Eligible:
- Alumni (graduated more than 6 months ago)
- Faculty and staff (separate education program available)
- Non-accredited institutions
